figures.caption: Table 1. MPJPE (mm) and PA-MPJPE (mm) on MM-Fi [46] dataset.

Figure 1. The overall architecture of our proposed PTA framework, built on a Purify-then-Align paradigm. The model is trained in a nested loop: (a) The Purify Stage: The Purify Stage optimizes the meta-learning weights w to mitigate the Contamination Effect. (b) The Align Stage: The Align Stage uses these weights w to construct a “clean teacher” fT and then uses it in a diffusion-based process (LDiffKD) to refine each “student” feature fS , thereby bridging the Representation Gap.
